title: The Escape Plan Tightens
description: On pages 17–20, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the escape plan tightens.
scene: The scene focuses on the escape plan tightens, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Does he really just see us

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: As nothing more than guinea pigs ....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Badmouth my captain to my face ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Things might have been a lot easier!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So as long as we live

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm sick of seeing your face!!

summary: The Escape Plan Tightens. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
